messages.subject: [R-gui] Tinn-R 1.18.1.5 released
messages.body_plain:
Dear Tinn-R user,

We would like to announce that a new version of the Tinn-R
(1.18.1.5) was released and is available (setup only) on SourceForge server: 
http://sourceforge.net/projects/tinn-r.

To see the changes, please, read: 'Help/From this version/English/Changes.txt'.

Briefly it will be available also on SciViews server: http://www.sciviews.org/Tinn-R

Regards,
-- 
Tinn-R Team
